/usr/lib64/ccache/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libfawkescore.so -o /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkescore.so CMakeFiles/fawkescore.dir/exception.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkescore.dir/plugin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkescore.dir/threading/scoped_rwlock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkescore.dir/threading/barrier.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkescore.dir/threading/thread_finalizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkescore.dir/threading/thread_loop_listener.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkescore.dir/threading/mutex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkescore.dir/threading/thread_notification_listener.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkescore.dir/threading/spinlock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkescore.dir/threading/interruptible_barrier.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkescore.dir/threading/thread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkescore.dir/threading/thread_initializer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkescore.dir/threading/mutex_locker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkescore.dir/threading/thread_collector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkescore.dir/threading/thread_list.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkescore.dir/threading/recursive_mutex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkescore.dir/threading/refc_rwlock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkescore.dir/threading/wait_condition.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkescore.dir/threading/read_write_lock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkescore.dir/utils/refcount.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkescore.dir/exceptions/software.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkescore.dir/exceptions/system.cpp.o  -lpthread -lstdc++ -lm -lrt
